{{Quote|I've heard of that ship. It belongs to the scavenger of the Galaxy...Redkihl Rokk.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Death Star Pirates">{{Kids1997Cite|issue1=16|issue2=20|story=Death Star Pirates}}</ref>}}
The '''''Hungry Ghost''''' was a extremely modified [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class cruiser]] owned by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] salvager [[Redkihl Rokk]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the freighter attempted to salvage scrap from the destroyed [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]. The cruiser, along with Rokk, were destroyed by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. It had at least 12 [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], which were powerful enough to aim at and damage a fast moving [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]].
